scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @hifi-box/core && npm run typecheck -w @hifi-box/content && npm run typecheck -w @hifi-box/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @hifi-box/core && npm run test -w @hifi-box/desktop && cargo test --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w @hifi-box/desktop
scripts.build:installer: npm run build && npm run tauri:build -w @hifi-box/desktop
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test
